indexes.indexdef: CREATE INDEX school_capacity_name_level_idx ON public.school_capacity USING btree (school_name_normalized, school_level, school_system)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX school_capacity_pkey ON public.school_capacity USING btree (school_capacity_id)
CREATE INDEX school_capacity_reference_idx ON public.school_capacity USING btree (school_reference_id)
CREATE INDEX school_capacity_status_idx ON public.school_capacity USING btree (capacity_status)
